items.briefing:
Partnered Health has confirmed a cyber incident affecting patient information across its national clinic network — a reminder that healthcare remains a high-value target for attackers in Australia. Separately, global research shows identity-based attacks have now overtaken software exploits as the leading cause of ransomware, meaning stolen or weak passwords are the most common way criminals break in.

Australian and New Zealand tech leaders are also warning that AI governance isn't keeping pace with how quickly AI is being adopted — raising real risks around data privacy and accountability. **Practical tip:** Review your passwords and enable multi-factor authentication on all work accounts today.

featured.title: Partnered Health confirms cyber incident affecting patient information across national clinic network
featured.quote: Major Australian healthcare network suffers data breach affecting patient information nationwide.
